/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/batcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o -o nexus  -lpthread
